text: A sense of anticipation fills me as I stand outside this glass-walled space, curious about what lies within. There is a sterile orderliness in the white walls, piping, and safety signs—a promise of control and security. Peering inside, I see vibrant lights and colors, a contrast to the calm neutrality of the hallway. I feel like I'm on the threshold of something meant to stimulate thought and provoke curiosity, and I yearn to cross through and engage with whatever questions or ideas wait inside.
